notes: Maps proposal_kind -> risk tier -> auto-submit policy. Phase LEARN's RubricRuleProposer emits typed proposals (wisdom_rule_add, planner_template_edit, etc.); SelfLearnCoordinator uses this table to decide whether to open a draft PR automatically vs. park for human review. NEVER promotes to auto-merge — human review at the merge step is the last safety gate.

low.description: Additive, scoped, reversible by a one-line revert. Draft PR auto-submit allowed when confidence clears threshold AND sample size clears floor.

medium.description: Modifies existing content. May interact with other rules. Draft PR auto-submit allowed with stricter gates; conflict check against open PRs required.

high.description: Touches routing, budgets, or orchestration flow. NEVER auto-submits — always parked for human review. Surfaced in morning digest instead.

experimental.description: Novel proposal kinds not seen before. Parked for human AND used to extend this matrix once the kind's empirical behavior is known.

wisdom_rule_add.rationale: Adding a rule is additive — it only fires when its conditions match. Worst case is a rule that doesn't help; easy revert.

wisdom_rule_modify.rationale: Changing an existing rule's scope or body affects every generation that matches. Needs higher signal.

wisdom_rule_remove.rationale: Removing a rule that's currently preventing a failure mode could regress silently. Human-review mandatory.

planner_template_edit.rationale: Planner prompts shape every generation. Changes cascade through planner→generator→evaluator. Always human-review.

generator_template_edit.rationale: Generator prompts produce the actual artifact. Edits can broadly regress output shape or fence marker.

evaluator_template_edit.rationale: Evaluator drives the rubric. Changes bias the ledger that the proposer itself reads — meta-risky.

context_recipe_edit.rationale: Recipes control what context gets injected. Scoped enough for medium tier.

complexity_tier_config.rationale: Tier config controls stage-skipping for entire difficulty levels. Budget changes have real cost impact.

wizard_artifact_type_add.rationale: Adding a new artifact type is a product-scope decision, not a rubric-driven auto-patch.

genre_catalog_add.rationale: New genre entries just enable classification; they don't affect existing routing. Phase GC already auto-promotes some of these.

overrides.note: Optional per-file tighter gates. An entry here overrides the proposal_kind defaults for that specific file. Useful for files with outsized blast radius.

wisdom/packs/universal.json.reason: Universal rules apply to every artifact type. Too broad to auto-submit.

wisdom/packs/visual-quality.json.reason: Visual quality rules are frequently adjusted but widely applied.
